title: Card image download and resize
description: When a card has an image_url, download it (SSRF-guarded, size-limited to 5MB), resize to max 800x418 (standard OG image ratio), store in media dir, update cards.image_path. Use existing image processing from media.rs.
close_reason: Done: fetch_card_image downloads, resizes to 800x418 max, saves as JPEG in media dir.
